name: Argos Open Source Sponsorship
description: Free visual regression testing for open source projects. Argos sponsors qualifying OSS projects with full access to their visual testing platform in exchange for a README badge.

perks.title: Free Visual Testing Platform
perks.description: Full access to Argos visual regression testing for open source repositories, covering screenshot comparison, diff detection, and review workflows.

perks.title: Integration Support
perks.description: Works with Playwright, Storybook, Cypress, WebdriverIO, Puppeteer, Next.js, React Router, and more.

eligibility: The project must be open source.
The project must not be for commercial use.
Usage of Argos must fall within reasonable use limits.
Must include the Argos badge in the repository README pointing to https://argos-ci.com.
Must include a dofollow link to https://argos-ci.com on at least one page.
The free plan may already be sufficient — sponsorship is for projects that need more.
applicationProcess: Verify your project meets all sponsorship criteria.
Send an email to contact@argos-ci.com confirming eligibility and explaining why the free tier is insufficient.
Include your Argos team slug and a link to your open source repository.
